summary: Completed testing of BIBI Cars CRM Team Lead Panel and integration features. Core functionality working but navigation visibility issue found.

minor_issues.impact: Team Lead Panel KPI data not loading from backend
Staff session alerts not loading in Team Lead Panel

ui_bugs.issue: Team Lead Panel link not visible in sidebar menu

integration_issues.issue: Sessions expire quickly causing frequent redirects to login page

passed_tests: Admin authentication with admin@crm.com / admin123 credentials
All 5 Ukrainian test customers displayed correctly in /admin/customers
Customer names: Олександр Петренко, Марія Коваленко, Іван Сидоренко, Наталія Бондаренко, Дмитро Шевченко
Team Lead Panel accessible via direct URL /admin/team-lead
Team Lead Dashboard component renders with proper data-testid
All 6 Team Lead KPI indicators found: Team Lead Panel, Активних менеджерів, Ліди сьогодні, Угоди в роботі, Дзвінки сьогодні, Активність команди
Settings page accessible with Інтеграції tab
All 4 integration sections found with data-testid: Stripe, DocuSign, Ringostat, OpenAI
Integration fields present: Secret Key, Publishable Key, API Key, Integration Key, Account ID, Bot Token
Backend API authentication working (7/9 endpoints successful)
action_item_for_main_agent: Add Team Lead Panel link to sidebar navigation menu so users can discover this feature. The functionality is implemented and working, but the navigation link is missing from the sidebar.

success_percentage.backend: 78% - 7/9 endpoints working, 2 missing endpoints for Team Lead Panel
success_percentage.frontend: 80% - Core functionality working, but navigation visibility and session management issues
